prompt_improvements.improvement: Explicitly require region constraints or validation when acceptance criteria depend on region-specific capabilities (for example zone-redundant Key Vault).
Require explicit verification of telemetry sampling effectiveness instead of only setting an Application Insights property.
Ask for either defaults or an example parameter file for required deployment parameters to reduce deployment-time failures.
When requiring allowSharedKeyAccess:false, explicitly require all AzureWebJobsStorage managed identity settings and required storage data-plane RBAC role assignments in the same issue.
